title: nepeta stricta var. curvidens
intro: Nepeta stricta var. curvidens, also known as catmint, is a variety of the Nepeta stricta plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. This herb has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the digestive system and reduce inflammation, making it a popular treatment for nausea, indigestion, and irritable bowel syndrome. The health benefits of Nepeta stricta var. curvidens include its anti-anxiety and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to reduce stress and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as insomnia and arthritis. Nepeta stricta var. curvidens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used as a dried herb in herbal blends and potpourri.
